message:
licensing: adopt MIT + OpenAI/Anthropic rider across workspace and crates

This updates FrankenPandas licensing text and package metadata to align with
the rider-style license policy used across related projects.

License text:
- Add root `LICENSE` with full "MIT License (with OpenAI/Anthropic Rider)"
  terms (including restricted-party definitions, derivative-use constraints,
  termination language, and enforcement clauses).

Cargo metadata alignment:
- Replace root workspace plain-MIT marker with `license-file = "LICENSE"`.
- Add `license-file = "../../LICENSE"` to each publishable crate manifest under
  `crates/*/Cargo.toml` so crate packaging points at the rider text explicitly.

Docs alignment:
- Add explicit README license statement:
  "MIT License (with OpenAI/Anthropic Rider). See LICENSE."

Result:
- Removes contradictory plain-MIT metadata and makes license intent explicit for
  workspace builds, crate packaging, and repository documentation.

files.patch:
@@ -17,7 +17,7 @@ members = [
 [workspace.package]
 edition = "2024"
 version = "0.1.0"
-license = "MIT"
+license-file = "LICENSE"
 
 [workspace.dependencies]
 bumpalo = { version = "3.16.0", features = ["collections"] }

@@ -118,6 +118,8 @@ Maintain deterministic null propagation, NaN handling, dtype promotion, and outp
 
 This command regenerates packet artifacts and fails closed if any packet parity report or packet gate is not green.
 
+If `rch` is installed, the script automatically offloads the expensive `cargo run` to the remote worker fleet. Set `FP_NO_RCH=1` to force local execution.
+
 ## Porting Artifact Set
